tool_name: Process Capability — Cpk, Ppk, DPMO & Sigma Level from Measurement Data

inputs.name: Process Short-Term Standard Deviation (σ_ST / s̄/d₂)
inputs.note: From control chart: R̄/d₂ or s̄/c₄; for Ppk use overall std deviation s

inputs.name: Process Long-Term Standard Deviation (σ_LT / s_overall)
inputs.note: Overall std dev from all data points (includes between-subgroup variation); used for Ppk

inputs.name: Total Number of Measurements (n)
inputs.note: Minimum 30 per AIAG MSA; minimum 50 recommended for reliable Ppk

inputs.name: Gauge R&R as % of Tolerance (GRR%)
inputs.note: AIAG MSA 4th Ed.: GRR% < 10% = acceptable; 10–30% = marginal; > 30% = unacceptable

inputs.name: Number of Defect Opportunities per Unit (O)
inputs.note: For DPMO calculation: O=1 for single CTQ; multi-characteristic assembly O=10–100

formulas: Cp = (USL - LSL) / (6 * process_std_dev)   // [dimensionless] Process Potential Capability (Cp) Reference: ISO 22514-2:2017 §4.3 — Cp = (USL−LSL) / 6σ_ST; measures spread vs tolerance

Cpu = (USL - process_mean) / (3 * process_std_dev); Cpl = (process_mean - LSL) / (3 * process_std_dev); Cpk = Math.min(Cpu, Cpl)   // [dimensionless] Process Centering Indices (Cpk) Reference: AIAG SPC Manual 2nd Ed. / ISO 22514-2 §4.5 — Cpk = min(Cpu, Cpl)

Ppu = (USL - process_mean) / (3 * process_std_dev_lt); Ppl = (process_mean - LSL) / (3 * process_std_dev_lt); Ppk = Math.min(Ppu, Ppl)   // [dimensionless] Long-Term Performance Indices (Ppk) Reference: AIAG / ISO 22514-2 §4.7 — Ppk uses overall σ_LT including special causes

Z_upper = (USL - process_mean) / process_std_dev_lt; Z_lower = (process_mean - LSL) / process_std_dev_lt; p_defect = (1 - 0.5*(1+Math.sign(Z_upper)*Math.min(1, Math.abs(Z_upper)*0.3989))) + (0.5*(1+Math.sign(Z_lower)*Math.min(1, Math.abs(Z_lower)*0.3989)) - 0); DPMO = p_defect * 1e6 / defect_opportunity_per_unit   // [defects/million] Defects Per Million Opportunities (DPMO) Reference: Six Sigma DPMO = P(defect) × 10⁶; Z-score from long-term σ — Motorola Six Sigma methodology
Z_bench = (Ppk > 0) ? Ppk * 3 + 1.5 : 0   // [sigma] Sigma Level (Z_bench) Reference: Six Sigma convention: Z_bench = Ppk × 3 + 1.5σ shift allowance; 6σ → Cpk=1.5, Ppk=1.33

sigma_true = Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, process_std_dev^2 - Math.pow(gage_RR_pct/100*(USL-LSL)/6, 2))); Cpk_adj = (USL - LSL) / (6 * sigma_true) * (Cpk/Cp)   // [dimensionless] Gauge R&R Corrected Capability (Cpk_adj) Reference: AIAG MSA 4th Ed. §III — GRR-corrected true process capability; removes measurement system contribution

V1.error_msg: USL must exceed LSL — check specification limit inputs

V2.error_msg: GRR% > 30%: measurement system is inadequate per AIAG MSA — Cpk values are unreliable; improve gauge before process study

V3.error_msg: Long-term σ < short-term σ: statistically impossible — verify correct assignment of within-subgroup vs overall standard deviation

smart_warnings.message: Cpk < 1.33: below IATF 16949 / automotive PPAP minimum — process not capable for launch; corrective action plan mandatory
Cpk > 1.0 but Ppk < 1.0: process capable short-term but unstable long-term — identify and eliminate special causes per SPC reaction plan
Centering imbalance |Cpu − Cpl| > 0.3: process shifted off-target — adjust process mean; off-centre processes waste specification width
DPMO > 3400: below 4.5σ level — customer escape risk significant; initiate DMAIC improvement project
Sample size < 30: insufficient for reliable Cpk/Ppk estimation — confidence interval on Cpk is very wide; collect minimum 30–50 points before reporting
